message:
fix(vdbe): clear pending delete state on cursor reposition

When a cursor is repositioned via Rewind, Last, SeekRowid, or SeekGE/etc.,
any pending delete state must be cleared. Without this fix, the delete
tracking from a previous position could incorrectly affect iteration
after repositioning.

Fixes test_delete_via_storage_cursor_write_path which was observing
stale delete state after cursor reposition.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
